title: digitalis pilosa
intro: Digitalis pilosa, also known as foxglove, is a biennial plant belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the heart and regulate cardiac rhythm due to the presence of digoxin and digitoxin, which are cardiac glycosides. The health benefits of Digitalis pilosa include improved heart function, reduced blood pressure, and relief from symptoms associated with congestive heart failure. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tincture, tea, or infusion, and has been used in various forms to support cardiovascular health.
